nodes.name: Ruflo Claude Code Config
nodes.content: Project configuration for Claude Code with agent coordination, swarm patterns, memory hooks, and build/test requirements

nodes.name: Non-standard Next.js
nodes.content: Warning that this project uses a non-standard Next.js version with breaking changes. Read docs in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code.

nodes.name: Smart Menu App
nodes.content: QR code restaurant menu system with ordering, loyalty, referral, and admin dashboard. Built with Next.js + PostgreSQL on Render.

nodes.name: Key Features
nodes.content: Digital menu, QR ordering, loyalty programs, referral system, admin dashboard, WhatsApp integration, Telegram notifications

nodes.name: Tech Stack
nodes.content: Next.js 16, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma 7, Tailwind CSS 4, Zustand, Playwright for E2E testing

nodes.name: Database Schema
nodes.content: PostgreSQL with 15+ tables: Restaurant, MenuCategory, MenuItem, Order, OrderItem, User, SubscriptionPlan, LoyaltyCard, Referral, RewardTransaction, AuditLog, SystemEvent, Setting, TelegramConfig, WhatsappTemplate

nodes.name: Decimal Price Fields
nodes.content: Price fields use @db.Decimal(10,2) in Prisma schema which serializes to JSON strings, requiring Number() coercion when comparing with === 0
